# nVent Liquid Cooling

**Category:** Liquid Cooling  
**Website:** https://www.nvent.com/

## Headline
Rack infrastructure and liquid cooling integration provider connecting enclosure design, thermal systems, and dense compute deployment.

## Overview
nVent Liquid Cooling is useful because it bridges several layers that buyers often source separately: rack systems, enclosure logic, and thermal integration. That makes it especially relevant when high-density AI deployments need the physical white-space package to work as a coordinated system rather than a collection of mismatched parts.

## Key capabilities
- integrated rack and liquid cooling design
- enclosure and white-space infrastructure relevance for dense compute
- thermal packaging suited to enterprise and hyperscale deployment paths

## Best fit for
- teams comparing rack-plus-cooling integration options
- operators evaluating how enclosure design affects thermal deployment choices
- buyers who need denser compute packaging without treating racks and cooling as separate silos

## Considerations
Best reviewed alongside Motivair, Vertiv, and Legrand depending on whether the comparison focus is thermal specialization, broad platform scope, or white-space hardware integration.
